title: The finite DC mode commutes with scalar multiplication

source.citation: Lloyd N. Trefethen, Spectral Methods in MATLAB, SIAM, 2000, Ch. 3, pp. 17-28.
source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: For any finite signal, the DC sum of a scalar multiple is the scalar multiple of the DC sum.

declarations.name: finiteDC
declarations.statement: def finiteDC {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (u : ι → Real) : Real := ∑ i ∈ s, u i

declarations.name: finiteDC_smul
declarations.statement: theorem finiteDC_smul {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (u : ι → Real) (c : Real) : finiteDC s (fun i => c * u i) = c * finiteDC s u

tasks.input: Translate the finite-index spectral/DC identity `finiteDC_smul` into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem finiteDC_smul {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (u : ι → Real) (c : Real) : finiteDC s (fun i => c * u i) = c * finiteDC s u

tasks.input: Identify the main finite-sum or mean-centering lemma needed for the proof.
